headline_seed: Russia launches 'horrific' drone, missile strikes on Ukraine, killing 17: Officials - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
draft_text:
#BreakingMews Russia fired 656 drones and 73 missiles at Ukraine overnight, killing at least 6 in Kyiv and striking a residential building in Dnipro. ABC News and CNN both report more than 100 wounded. Zelenskyy is urging urgent Patriot resupply.

And that's the mews.
